message:
test(ssh): add unit tests for ssh_domain_to_ssh_config and build_command

Add 5 unit tests covering SSH domain configuration mapping and remote
command building: domain override fields (port, user, no_agent_auth,
ssh_option), global ssh_backend fallback, non-posix command passthrough,
posix shell env inlining with command_dir override, domain default_prog,
and bare fallback when no command is provided.

Use a mutex-guarded TestConfigGuard to serialize tests that mutate
global config state. Import reordering is rustfmt normalization only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
